projects.title: Project Administration
projects.subtitle: Manage all projects across the organization

changeOwnerDialog.title: Change Project Owner
changeOwnerDialog.description: Search for a user to assign as the new owner of this project.

worker.title: Worker Management
worker.subtitle: Reset the checkpoint, backfill missing meetings, and review imported meetings

checkpoint.title: Tenant Checkpoint
checkpoint.description: Defines from which point in time the worker fetches meetings from the Microsoft calendar on the next run. Rewinding enables backfilling missed meetings.
checkpoint.none: No checkpoint – worker uses the default window
checkpoint.clearConfirm: Clear checkpoint? The worker will use the default sync window.
checkpoint.validationFuture: Date must not be in the future.
checkpoint.validationTooOld: Date cannot be more than {days} days in the past.

backfill.title: Trigger Backfill
backfill.description: Fetches missing meetings for all users within the specified window. Meetings already imported (same meetingId) are skipped.
backfill.dryRunSuccess: Dry run complete – no data was changed.
backfill.validationRange: From date must be earlier than to date.
backfill.validationTooOld: From date cannot be more than {days} days in the past.

meetings.title: Imported Meetings
meetings.description: Overview of all meetings indexed by the worker with audit information.
meetings.forceAnalyzeConfirm: Re-analyze meeting '{title}'? Existing todos, project statuses and minutes will be replaced.
meetings.recrawlConfirm: Reprocess meeting '{title}'? Existing todos, project statuses and minutes will be replaced.
